summary: Support & Privacy Policy Feature Testing Complete - All 12 backend tests passed. POST /api/support endpoint working with Resend email integration (real emails sent). /privacy and /support pages fully functional with proper validation, success states, and navigation.

api_support_valid_submission.details: POST /api/support with valid data returns 200 with email_id (real email sent via Resend)

api_support_empty_name_422.details: POST /api/support with empty name returns 422 'Name is required'

api_support_short_message_422.details: POST /api/support with message < 10 chars returns 422 'Message must be at least 10 characters'

api_support_optional_subject.details: POST /api/support with empty subject still works (subject is optional)

api_support_response_structure.details: Response wrapped by StandardResponseMiddleware: {success: true, data: {message, email_id}, error: null}

privacy_page_loads.details: /privacy page loads with title 'Privacy Policy', all 8 sections visible, contact email link (support@spetapp.com)

privacy_page_navbar.details: PageNavbar with spet logo and Back button visible

privacy_page_footer.details: PageFooter with Privacy Policy and Support links visible

support_page_loads.details: /support page loads with title 'Support', form card with all 4 fields (name, email, subject, message)

support_form_validation.details: Empty form submission shows validation errors: 'Name is required', 'Invalid email address', 'Subject is required', 'Message must be at least 10 characters'

support_form_submission.details: Valid form submission shows success state with 'Message sent!' and 'Send another message' button

support_common_topics.details: Common Topics grid shows 4 cards: Account issues, App errors, NFC functionality, General questions

support_please_include.details: Please Include section shows 3 items: Your device type, A description of the issue, Screenshots if possible

landing_footer_links.details: Landing page footer has Privacy Policy and Support links, navigation works

privacy_footer_links.details: /privacy page footer has Privacy Policy and Support links

support_footer_links.details: /support page footer has Privacy Policy and Support links

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Real emails sent via Resend API during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Support & Privacy Policy features complete. POST /api/support uses Resend SDK to send real emails to support@spetapp.com. Frontend validation uses Zod schema. PageNavbar and PageFooter components exported from PrivacyPolicy.js and reused in Support.js. All footer links on landing, privacy, and support pages working.

data_verified.email_sent: Real emails sent during testing with email_id returned
